prompt: Based on the referenced image, create a font showcase ("A" to "Z", "a" to "z" and "0" to "9") with the exact same font style in the image.
prompt_refined: Generate an image displaying a comprehensive font character set. The font style must precisely replicate the typography observed in image 1. The image should distinctly feature all uppercase letters (A-Z), all lowercase letters (a-z), and all digits (0-9). Arrange these characters in a clear, organized, and legible layout, on a solid dark blue background with the text rendered in white, consistent with the visual style of image 1.
objects: typographic annotation lines (should not be present)
